error_signature: Unable to connect to Microsoft SQL Server
title: Connection failure to Microsoft SQL Server Express
symptom: When attempting to connect the Microsoft SQL node to SQL Server Express, the connection fails without a specific error message.
not_this_if: SQL Server Express is not installed
root_cause: The connection issue may arise from Docker's networking configuration, where the n8n instance cannot resolve the local SQL Server Express instance's IP address correctly. Using 'host.docker.internal' allows Docker containers to communicate with the host machine's services.
fix_steps: Open the Microsoft SQL node settings in n8n.
agent_instruction: Change the IP address in the Microsoft SQL node settings to 'host.docker.internal'.
